answers: Event planning involves organizing all aspects of an event — from budgeting and venue selection to catering, decorations, and scheduling. Start with a clear goal and timeline.

Event plan korte: prothome budget fix koro, date ar venue select koro, guest list banao, caterer ar decorator book koro, ar ekta checklist follow koro. Plan ahead koro — last minute stress avoid hobe.
A good event checklist includes: define purpose, set budget, choose date and venue, create guest list, arrange food and drinks, plan entertainment, send invitations, and have a backup plan.

Event management is a growing career field. You need creativity, organization skills, ability to handle pressure, and strong communication. Start by volunteering to organize small events and build your portfolio.
